commands.start: Welcome to Eiva — your AI digital twin on TON
commands.setup: Upload your Telegram export to build your twin
commands.add_source: Add another chat export to deepen your personality
commands.mint: Mint your Soul Certificate on TON
commands.avatar: Generate an AI avatar for your twin
commands.mode: Switch between Personal and Professional mode

messages.welcome: Your personality, preserved on the blockchain.
messages.setup_prompt: Send your Telegram export JSON file
messages.twin_ready: Your digital twin is ready to chat.
messages.soul_certificate_minted: 🎉 Soul Certificate created on TON testnet!
messages.mode_switched: Mode switched! Your twin will now respond {{mode}}.

modes.personal_desc: Warm, casual, open — like talking to a close friend
modes.professional_desc: Knowledgeable, measured, professional — like a trusted expert
